text.title: Storybook Testing and CI
text.summary: @storybook/test-runner runs headless Playwright over all stories; Chromatic captures visual snapshots; addon-a11y runs axe. Common Storybook 8 gotchas that break CI.

section.title: test-runner CI Setup

rule.statement: Run @storybook/test-runner after storybook build in CI. Build the static export first; do not run test-runner against the dev server.
rule.rationale: The dev server is not deterministic (HMR, timing); the static build is reproducible and correctly represents what Chromatic will snapshot.

section.reference: GitHub Actions workflow for build + test-runner

rule.statement: Run Chromatic on every PR. Treat baseline acceptance as a human step — auto-accept only on the main branch merge.
rule.rationale: Auto-accepting on PRs defeats the visual review gate; regressions accumulate silently until a release reveals them.

rule.statement: Replace argTypesRegex action pattern with @storybook/addon-actions decorators. Do not copy Storybook 6.x action config.
rule.rationale: argTypesRegex for auto-actions is deprecated in Storybook 8 and produces console warnings that pollute CI logs.

antipattern.description: Using @storybook/react framework adapter for Next.js App Router instead of @storybook/nextjs.
antipattern.reason: Without @storybook/nextjs, useRouter returns null in stories, causing every story that imports a link component to throw.

antipattern.description: Adding duplicate addons entries in main.ts from multi-pass agent edits.
antipattern.reason: Duplicate addon entries cause addon panels to be empty; Storybook starts but the controls/a11y/actions tabs are invisible.
